title: Xenial Basque Potato Bake
description: Umami-packed, tender potatoes baked in a wood-fired style with Basque-inspired flavors, vegan and full of adventure.
instructions: Preheat oven to 220°C and line a baking dish with parchment.
In a small saucepan combine vegetable broth, soy sauce, smoked paprika, oregano, and sea salt; simmer 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Toss potato slices with olive oil, minced garlic, and half the seasoning mixture until coated.
Arrange coated potatoes in a single even layer in the baking dish, smoothing the top with a spatula.
Drizzle remaining broth mixture over the potatoes, then scatter sliced shallot and black olives on top.
Bake 35 minutes, remove, sprinkle with nutritional yeast and chopped parsley, then return to oven 10 minutes until golden and tender.
Let rest 5 minutes before slicing into wedges and serving hot.
